title: Find My Device - Sending Tone - back button
scenario: When using Find My Device with a headset paired and connected, tapping the back arrow after playing a tone stops the sound and returns to App Settings.
steps: Pair and connect a headset to the device.
Open the Find My Device app.
Play a tone on the headset.
Tap the back arrow in the top left corner.
expected: The sound stops and the user is brought back to the App Settings page.
